testimonials.title: What Parents & Teachers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from our growing community
testimonials.t1Quote: KinderCode made learning fun and easy for my son! He went from playing games to creating them in just 3 months.
testimonials.t2Quote: Our students love the coding competitions. It's amazing to see their creativity and problem-solving skills grow!
testimonials.t3Quote: The curriculum is perfectly structured. My daughter looks forward to her coding time every single day.
